architecture.summary: Cross-project sync routing via resolveSyncTarget, 3 child repos

integrations.summary: GitHub API, JIRA REST API, ADO REST API via existing sync pipeline

ui-ux.summary: CLI output only, no UI changes

performance.summary: Sequential per-project sync, 30s throttle per repo

security.summary: PAT tokens from .env, no new secrets

edge-cases.summary: Unknown project falls back to global, partial config returns available targets
